reviews.review_description: This game is hidden gem with lots of content, and its crunchy pixel art style looks super cool in VR. The environment looks great and I especially liked the dungeons which remind me of Elder Scrolls games. The first island/village is smaller and has few Quests, so it's more like a tutorial, but once you get to the second island then the game becomes a lot more interesting. The game offers several spells, different types of melee/range weapons, good enemy variety, bosses, dungeons, and different islands that are open to explore (each very different from the other). I did find some bugs here and there: like sometimes I was not able to reload the sword gun, or once I couldn't  grab a key from my inventory, but when that happened it fixed itself on the next session or after a restart. My biggest gripe with the game is the UI to switch weapons: in an RPG that has cool different weapons, having to open a menu, select the weapon category, and only then select the weapon you want (all the while being chased by enemies) is a bit of a hassle. It would be great if the game had a weapon wheel system (similar to HF Alyx), or maybe several holsters other than one on each shoulder (so you could favorite a weapon on each category to quickly grab them) because that would allow to try a big variety of weapons on each enemy encounter. Even with these issues, the game is loads of fun and has that exploration and fantasy vibe found in WOW and TES games that works great in VR.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the great review!
We are definitely inspired by WOW and TES, among others - and we are glad that you are enjoying it!!
Some of the most fun that we've had when building DrakkenRidge, has been designing the variety of environments and enemies, and we're glad that you appreciate the diversity!
Great to hear all your thoughts, thanks for playing :)

reviews.review_description:
Hesitated at buying this game because of the
 graphics...I was wrong easily one of the best vr games I've played and a long campaign to...who needs behemoth n horizon call of the mountain graphics..this is a delight to play 👍🏻

developer_response.body:
Thrilled that you decided to give DrakkenRidge a go!
We've loved building such a large world and long campaign - and it's awesome to hear that you're enjoying it. Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_title: Better than Skyrim VR without mods
reviews.review_description:
The game is amazing and has a lot of potential. 

There are a few issues which I will list right now
- ￼ the run button is annoying to use
- ￼ the combat is so slow I can wear my 2 kg wrist weights and still parry  in good time
- There is a lot of glitches. Don’t expect this game to be smooth.

However
This game has a lot of character it is RuneScape & Skyrim combined. 
The magic system is well polished compared to other RPG’s.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
We're glad you are enjoying it - it has been an exciting adventure for our small team to craft such a big world for our players :)
(and yes, the spell casting is one of my personal favorites)
There is a setting in the menu if you want to toggle sprint on/off vs hold-to-sprint.
Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I've played my fair share of VR games, some I've really enjoyed, some I've refunded within minutes. This game may just be my favorite of all time. The vibe is immaculate, I wholeheartedly enjoy the graphics (reminds me of RuneScape) and just simply works well for VR.

The gameplay is super enjoyable, from melee, ranged to spell casting combat all feeling superb.

Exploration is fun, lots of side quests and chests scattered about. The map is easy to follow, and controls are all intuitive and as far as I can tell from old negative reviews, all of those problems have been fixed.

Potion crafting, blacksmithing/item crafting, spell skill tree and more are all a part of the game and are enjoyable.

Seriously, if you're even slightly considering getting this, please do. You won't be disappointed.

developer_response.body: Wow! Thank you so much for this great review! We indeed aimed at making an exciting and sweeping adventure in spite of the small size of our team - reading this feels so rewarding to us! Thanks, comments like these make our days, weeks and months :)

reviews.review_description: This is a cool as game so far with cool graphics but it has its little glitches and some other little problems with it but other than that if that was to be taken care of this game actually could be better than ever

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the good review, glad you are enjoying the game! If you'd like to join our discord server to report glitches, and hear about coming updates, your are more than welcome!
https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_title: Fun nostalgic RPG, but lacks polish
reviews.review_description:
DrakkenRidge is a decent RPG in the vein of old-school RuneScape, with a world that gives off slight WoW vibes. The graphics feature a nostalgic 3D polygonal style with crunchy pixel art textures which I really enjoyed. The story is forgettable, but the semi-open world is charming despite frequent (though short) loading screens.

My biggest gripe is the lack of polish. Even in the January 2026 build, graphical bugs are everywhere. The most immersion breaking issue is world geometry like trees and buildings and other stuff just hanging in mid-air, and this happens on almost every map. I’ve also had loot clip through the floor and quests failing to update (had to go to another map then back again to fix this).

The developers have added welcome QoL updates, like summoning weapons with the grip buttons, but the execution is flawed. The hand swapping mechanic triggers too easily, especially if you play seated. My weapon and shield frequently swapped places even when my hands were on each side of my chair’s armrests, leading to a few avoidable deaths during combat.

Combat itself is lackluster; you can often just hold your weapon still and let enemies walk straight into it. Additionally, the UI provides no info on weapon stats or potion effects. Returning to the game after a break is difficult because you have to guess what your items do. I actually had to watch a YouTube video of the tutorial island just to refresh my memory.

Other frustrations include buggy throwing knives, arrows disappearing upon death (while bullets stay), and persistent bugs like invisible targets that were supposedly patched.

Overall, the core experience is enjoyable and the passion is visible, but it feels unfinished and unpolished. It needs more love and bug fixing to truly reach its potential.

developer_response.body:
Sorry you didn't enjoy the game more :( - For combat, that harder you'll swing that weapon, the more damage you'll make... We are a bit concerned about the "trees and buildings hanging mid air". We'd love to talk on Discord to see what could be causing it, as it is not a complaint we've seen before (there's a very very short window of stuff that could sometimes take a second to appear when you enter a freshly loaded place, but it seems your issue goes far beyond this)
Oh, and good catch on the WoW vibes: big fan here! :)

reviews.review_description:
I love the titles made by this studio because they always surprise me with their originality and fun. Drakken Ridge thrilled me so much, especially artistically, and I haven't had this much fun since Skyrim, and that's saying something. I devoured this title, both the main quest and the side quests. The islands are always different and full of secrets, and the combat and spell mechanics are easy to learn and fun to use. I had several bugs during the adventure, especially in the final part of the game, which forced me to restart the game several times. The biggest problem, however, that prevented me from fully enjoying the experience, was the lack of Italian subtitles. I understand that translating a game costs money, but nowadays, with automatic translation, there are no excuses. The lack of subtitles held me back from purchasing it, but then, reading the reviews, I realized I would have missed out on a wonderful experience. Well done guys!

Adoro i titoli realizzati da questo studio perché mi sorprendono sempre per originalità e divertimento. Drakken Ridge mi ha emozionato tantissimo soprattutto artisticamente parlando e non mi divertivo cosi dai tempi di Skyrim ed è tutto dire. Questo titolo l'ho divorato, sia nella missione principale che nelle secondarie. le isole sono sempre diverse e ricche di segreti e le meccaniche di combattimento e incantesimi sono semplici da assimilare e divertenti da usare. Ho avuto diversi bug durante l'avventura soprattutto nella parte finale del titolo che mi hanno costretto diverse volte a riavviare la partita. Il problema più grande però che mi ha impedito di godermi appieno l'esperienza è la mancanza dei sottotitoli in italiano perché io capisco che tradurre un gioco ha un costo ma oggi come oggi con la traduzione automatica non ci sono scuse. La mancanza dei sottotitoli mi ha frenato nell' acquisto ma poi leggendo le recensioni ho capito che mi sarei perso una bellissima esperienza. Bravi ragazzi

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review! We are thrilled that you love the game :)
We have a content update coming December 18th - so stay tuned for more quests and adventures!

reviews.review_description: Very charming, it reminds me of Morrowind. I hope they continue to develop and flesh out the game it’s a gem thats absolutely worth playing.

developer_response.body:
Thanks you for the good review! We are indeed fans of Morrowind (and Oblivion, Skyrim, Daggerfall, RedGuard, Arena... played them all with delight back then!)
We are hoping, too, that we get to keep working on this! :)

reviews.review_description: Totally great game and I love it!! My save game would not load. Went on discord and developer fixed the problem and was totally nice!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!! We are always glad to help :)
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I gave Drakken Ridge a try and was pleasantly surprised by how easy it was to pick up. The story and the gameplay pulled me in right away, and the game ran really smoothly—no dizziness at all. This is a big deal for me - other VR games have made me really uncomfortable during and after. It’s a great mix of fun and comfort.  Excited to keep working my way through the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We hope you enjoy taking down a gigantic Dragon, at the end! :)

reviews.review_description: It gives me a strong nostalgic feel. Ita a pixelated look but designed beautifully, not that ugly block look I'm not a fan of. There is a tone of content to keep you busy and gameplay feels smooth. Highly  recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! Stay tuned, we have more content on the way!!! :)

reviews.review_description: I don't have loads of time to play but I noticed i have recently spent all my gaming time in VR and that is because of this game. It is super aesthetic and it can be quite a challenge when you are overwhelmed with enemies. The story so far is interesting and having that Skyrim dungeon vibe is nostalgic. The soundtrack, particularly drakken isles, is just fantastic, it hits all the right feels and moments. I'm still yet to finish the game but I have been enjoying it lots. Please keep updating this game, the devs have clearly enjoyed making this. I think i just wanted an option to carry a bigger satchel instead of going back to the inn to store things. But I havent finished so maybe we get one.

developer_response.body:
We did, indeed, loved making the game, and are glad you are enjoying it (and yes, Drakken Isle is my favorite track too, although some players really like the Elven track). We recently introduced a chest in you Lair, to store your belongings.
If you have any question, or want to get in touch, join us on the server > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd )

reviews.review_description: I completed it but I think it could use more difficulty settings. Final boss went down with one mana bar of fireballs. I think the weapon system should use holsters, two on shoulders and two on the hips. The game has an amazing atmosphere and vibe, magic system is also very unique. Hopefully the dev will introduce some of the stuff I mentioned

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good review and glad you liked the game! In the settings, in a recent patch, we gave a "shoulder equip" option for weapons... We've also updated a few things and quality of life :) We are still working on the game and should have some cool announcement soon!

reviews.review_description:
The game seems fun but there is too much problems and bugs for now, for exemple the belt don't follow your head, when you grab the book you have to select your weapon again, and you can't grab stuff from distance, so objects on the ground are difficult to grab and you have your belt in your eyes. Sometimes you fall through the ground for nothing.
Nothing than updates can't upgrade, i hope the devs will change this little problems quickly but for a release it's a deception.

developer_response.body:
Hey sleskesh!
We've updated and added the features you mentioned - distance grab, belt updates, weapon/book summoning, and much more! (build v8.0+)
Cheers!
Our discord link is: https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description: Just finished the 'Main Quest' line and have to say even with the occasional crazy bugs, this game is typical Garage Collective and by that I mean heaps of fun, a lot of people will down vote it for the visual style, but me personally I just love being in these pixel worlds chatting with the curious characters (and there are a lot of characters), everything that the Garage Collective have produced till now has been leading up to this, its just such a fun time and will only get better as the (small) team set out to squash those bugs... and they will!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot!!! Really enjoyed watching the gameplay videos!

reviews.review_title: A Much Needed Breath of Fresh Air!
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love the aim of Drakkenridge and already feel immersed in the world. Characters have spoken dialog, the map feels expansive, quests are enjoyable, crafting is done well, and the art style is reminiscent of Stones of Harlath. I can't wait to jump back in to play more! I hope that one day they include Quest Achievements, but this is one I'll be spending a lot of hours in.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We have a few things to focus on before the achievements, but once we address some quality of life updates, we'll look into it! :)

reviews.review_description: Just started the game and the seated standing menu already told me who made this...stones of harlath pimps. This is gonna kick a$$! Take my money and yes with the dlcs please ❤️ 💪

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review, and thank you for enjoying our games! it means the world to us!!! :)

reviews.review_description:
Just as all the other games that this developer released this one, as well, is an absolute blast. Gorgeous art, a tight experience.

Other negative reviews focus on some polish details that can and probably will be patched up quick and easy but the game already is a lot of fun now.

Love the little parrot dude on the started island!

A must buy.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for that nice review! :) We worked hard, we are a small dev team and we are doing our best to provide a fun adventure to players. It's good to hear you are enjoying it:)

reviews.review_description:
The first patch addressed all my concerns.  Great job dev's, this is becoming one of my favorite games!  I will be featuring a playthrough of the game on my YouTube channel soon @APEboys

Let me start by saying I love these Devs games Shock Troops and Stones of Harlof.  I pre-ordered this and have been extremely excited to play it.  I love the art style and overall concept so far and I am only an hour into the game.  That being said it definitely needs some QOL updates and here are some suggestions.

1.  The tool belt won't turn with you if you physically turn only when turning with the control stick.  I like turning irl to add to emersion.

2.  The inventory system needs a change.  Every time I try to grab something in the game I grab things out of my inventory.  A backpack set up would be best with the ability to drop things over your shoulder.  even something similar to Dungeons of Eternity where it has a area on your belt that allows you to just drop items in and can access by either a button press or squeezing grip over a indicator.

3.  I had a weird glitch when I entered through a door where my right hand and arm was stretched way out and it stayed that way the rest of my play session.  I tried going back through the door a couple times hoping loading back in would correct it but it didn't.

I know these Devs will patch it up and I am looking forward to playing more.  It needs work but I trust these Devs so I would still recommend it but maybe wait till they put a patch in first.

Does this game have a Discord?  If not please set one up so the community can help shape the future of this game.  Thanks!

developer_response.body: Thanks for sticking with us! :) Can't wait to see the video(s)!

reviews.review_description:
Just completed it. I didn't see credits, though, so it seems like the end because there is nothing left to do regarding the main story.

It was a great RPG. I haven't seen or played an rpg like it on the Quest, so for a first-time VR RPG player, it was great, but you have to forgive a few things.

For instance, the number of times I have fallen through the map is ridiculous, which was the main bug. Then, for some reason, water surrounded me like my screen looked like I was underwater when I was above ground, which was another bug. I was supposed to get a bow in the end, but I didn't presumably because that bugged out. There were so many bugs! This is why I give it 4 stars instead of 5.

But the game was fun and left me with a good taste in my mouth, so I hope the dev expands on this work in the future!

developer_response.body:
Hello, and congratulations!
- For the credits, they are available in the menu - we assumed some players would enjoy roaming the world, finishing up quests, etc (and are hoping the game will be successful enough to warrant additional content) so we didn't stop the game at the end.
- Many of the bugs you've encountered have been fixed in the most recent patches.
- We've also fixed the missing bow! So you can go to the elf town where you earned it, and you should find it there :) 
> join us on Discord if you want to see what's on our slate (and for the future!) https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd
Thanks for the nice review, and glad you enjoyed the game!!

reviews.review_title: The Type of Game I’ve Been Waiting For!!
reviews.review_description: My favorite video game genre has always been action RPGs and unfortunately,they are few and far between in VR. Needless to say,this game was a must have for me. I really didn’t know what to expect considering it was made by a small indie studio and made for Quest 3 with limited resources. Turns out,it’s much better than I expected it to be. There is a lot of land to explore spanning across multiple different islands. It has a crafting system,multiple different types of weapons,magical powers and upgrades. It has the main quests and plenty of side quests,as you would expect from a RPG. It is a little rough around the edges at times. You carry everything on your belt which is quite cumbersome,it would be nice if you had a backpack to store your belongings in and only carried potions on your belt. Aside from the belt,I really don’t have any other gripes about . If you’re a fan of action RPGs,I highly recommend giving this game a shot

developer_response.body: Wow! Thanks for the nice words! This game is a work of passion, and you nailed what we wanted to do: provide an adventure for players to escape in! We are working at ironing out the "rougher edges" so stay tuned! and thanks again for the nice words! :)

reviews.review_description: DrakkenRidge honestly feels like one of those special 90s epic fantasy games I used to play on PC, now on VR! The physics-based combat is impactful, the main and side stories are bountiful and the world itself wondrous. Just hope they fix a few bugs and make the running a bit faster. Other than that, it's an excellent game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review! In a couple hours, we will have a post up to explain what's coming soon, as well as an invite to join us on our discord!

reviews.review_description:
I'll start by saying, it definitely needs a patch or two but it's an intriguing story and pretty fun gameplay. In the first 2 hours of game play I currently have glitched through the floors 3 times, can't climb ladders cause the left hand sends me flying through the floor or into another room and the right hand makes me do a little jump, my right hand got stretched out looking, and there needs to be a jump button instead of having to stop running to use teleport. I would like to be able to turn off joystick turning because I currently have stick drift and so do a lot of other people cause it seems to be a common problem among Q2, Q3 and Q3s but even if not drifting, it makes me motion sick if I even bump it and don't turn naturally. Grabbing and putting away things from inventory doesn't always work right and isn't smooth like you would want it to be.

The game itself is great though.

Update:A great lil adventure worth 5 stars and worth the play

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the nice review, and glad we were able to smooth out the experience with our first couple patches! :)

reviews.review_title: Low on polygons, high on charm.
reviews.review_description: This is a fun old-style RPG with plenty of quests and a deliberate art-style choice that harkens back to games from the mid 1990's. Combat is fun and rewarding, with nice parry mechanics. NPCs are voice acted, giving the world a feeling of being alive. This is a nice mix of old-school RPGs with modern VR mechanics.  I love it.  My only complaint is that the pouch items can be fiddly to work with sometimes but it's not game-breaking.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good review! Glad you enjoyed the game! We are currently at work on some of the most requested "Quality of Life" features and should have a patch soon - Some of it making using the weapons and inventory easier... :) Please join us on Discord if you want to discuss the future of DrakkenRidge > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description:
Although launch is buggy and kinda weird RN, this is the most fun I've had in a very long time. It really hit the Runescape, Skyrim vibe I've been wanting ... I didn't know i needed.
       This really could go places in terms of DLC content for maps, weapons and lore.  I wouldn't have a problem with this if that includes co-op.
       Thanks for making a real VR RPG game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review!!! and yes, you nailed our references :) (I will add Oblivion and World of Warcraft to the list of our inspiration, particularly visually)
And yes, should the game do well, we have so many ideas on where to send players next... sky is really the limit here! :)
We should have a new patch tomorrow, to take care of some of the recurrent complaints about usability!

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely love the landscapes, from the swampy beachy level you start at,
To the relatively large second island.
To the vibrant green sewers.
The exploration has been fun in a similar way to a budget Skyrim. I enjoyed the exploration on here more than Asgard's wrath.

developer_response.body: Thanks a LOT! That's praise that goes straight to my heart! One of our core tenets for DrakkenRidge was to create environments that players would enjoy being "present" in, so your review makes us feel great! :)

reviews.review_title: Exactly game is SO MUCH FUN 10 10 10 10
reviews.review_description: Game play is fun I'm totally in hands up .but I'm on the 3 headset brand-new  so I know it is not me .please fix the grabbing of weapons some times my arm twirls in sure you will fix Other than that I'm thinking totally Im totally immersed . I love this game just the way you made it I'm keeping this game I know a good game when I'm playing one this it it . Thank you for making this epic great wonderful game ..

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good review! Yeah, we issued a patch today (1.2) and will be working down our list of issues on subsequent patches! Glad to hear it allows you to enjoy the game more fully: stay tuned! :)

reviews.review_description:
This game is fantastic! This game grips you in right from the moment you find yourself on Skull Island. First off, the world is beautiful. So many things to discover along the way of your journey. Great amount of side quests that help  build your character to be better equipped for future battles. As you check in to the local Inn you start to really feel part of the towns people. Completing tasks and helping out the locals while at the same time completing the objective at hand. I've only visited a couple of the Islands but I enjoy how they change it up from one to the other. I was able to unlock a couple magic spells that really make you feel like a wizard as you battle your foes. Good amount of weapons as well. Material can easily be crafted as you pick up the necessary tools along the way of your journey. Voice acting is also spot on. Everything just seems to come together perfect in this game.

The only little hiccup I had was when I was completing one of the tasks for the towns folks. I had to get rid of a monster blocking a cave. During the battle it seemed to lag really bad. It's a shame cause the creature was fantastic looking and I wish I could have enjoyed the battle to it's full potential. I was able to move on but just wish that section ran smoother. Besides that one little bug everything else is great and I'd strongly recommend giving this great tittle the attention it deserves.

in response to developer post: That's correct. It was during the battle with the Giant Gorilla where everything started to really slow down.

developer_response.body:
EDIT: fixed the monster issue you found! Thanks for bringing it to our attention :)

Thank you for the nice review! Glad you enjoyed our game :)
About the hiccup, I assume you are talking about Kang, the giant Gorilla on Drakken Isle? We'll have a look at it and try to hunt down what could have caused the frame drop - Feel free to join us on our Discord > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely adore this game, there are however some caveats. The game is not perfect, with its fair share of bugs and glitches however the devs are very active in patching and I feel like it doesn't subtract from the overall impression. The graphics are incredibly charming and I find myself completely losing track of time while playing which in my mind speaks volumes. It's one of the few games where I go in with a fully charged headset and get surprised when I get the low battery notification because I didn't realize how long I've been playing. 

There are some bugs as mentioned but the devs have been super great with communication and listening in the discord to fix these. Overall I feel like this game is an absolute must play if you're a fan of the fantasy rpg genre!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! There are more fixes and corrections down the line, to make it an even more compelling game. Thanks for the good review!

reviews.review_description:
Ok now that I have completed the game, I feel i need to completely rewrite this review. 

Yes there are still a few bugs and issues but the main ones are fixed and the rest should mostly be fixed in the next patch soon, The dev is very active on Discord getting these fixed.

The game looks amazing if you like Retro pixel art style, which i do lol. And has lots of different areas to explore, meaningful quests to undertake  and some fun boss fights. If you like RPGs and want a good adventure grab a ticket to Drakkenridge today!

developer_response.body: All Hail the new Dux!!! Thank you for enjoying the game, and we are honored you spent some of your time in our adventure! Hopefully, more coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
Love the art style. Gameplay is fun and the story is fine. Highly recommend it. I've experienced a few bugs. Arrows are impossible to use. Movement sometimes over shoots.  The holster isn't the best I've experienced. Hopefully they get to fix these to be 10/10 game.

PS: The trailer doesn't do the game justice. Might wanna redo it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review!

We have an update coming very soon, so stay tuned. As well as a post with a link to our discord - would love to hear more about your experience.

Cheers!

reviews.review_title: What a wonderful gem of a game!.
reviews.review_description: Well done Devs for creating a wonderful game reminds me of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion runescape vibes. Some things are a little clunky but the gameplay is there and the atmosphere it's fantastic! Combat is fun. I would rather have a game like this rather than a AAA title with no gameplay. Keep up the good work  people. If you're on the fence about buying this game, buy it and support the Devs it's a little gem more people need to know about this game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the nice words! OBLIVION!!! yes, totally an inspiration (with World of Warcraft, somehow, for the visual vibe...) - for most of the clunky parts, we are working on several patches to smooth-out the experience, but not everything will always be totally to the taste of everyone, and in that regard, we share a bit of Oblivion DNA as well ;)
Thanks again! you nailed what we were trying to achieve as a very small dev team (2 people for most of the production)

reviews.review_title: Good but lots of jank atm
reviews.review_description:
*just saw the post about the updates and the discord link there. Please add it to your other socials and website as well! Will go over and post my videos of bugs there instead*

Enjoying the vibe, art style and gameplay so far. Unfortunately there are a lot of bugs. Weird things like my hand progressively changing its perspective until it becomes completely 2D. The belt is pretty annoying unless you completely hide it. Smooth turn fast is hilariously slow. Re centering VR will occasionally through you miles up in the sky. Without a community discord for their games it is difficult to provide feedback apart from on this review. Hopefully some updates can fix some of this jank, otherwise I love direction the game has gone in and hope it gets expanded on in future.

developer_response.body:
I recognize your name (on X?) - thanks for enjoying our game! :) Yes, the discord is now open and everyone's invited. You saw that we are already addressing some of the issues you mentioned, the others will be investigated and prioritized as we uncover them!
Thanks for the positive review! It means a lot to us and keeps us pushing forward!

reviews.review_title: Pixelated Skyrim with a ton of heart.
reviews.review_description:
First and foremost, I just wanted to express my love and appreciation for the developers concerning this game.  The soundtrack is deeply immersive, and the gameplay/ graphics are well done.  I’ve played for a couple hours thus far, and I’m really enjoying the experience.  I have been waiting for an open world rpg for quite a while, and for this price point, it can’t be beat. Are there glitches?  Yes, but I am confident that the developers will be able to patch them out in the upcoming months, and considering the openness to the feedback they have already received, they appear certainly motivated in making this game the best it can possibly be.  On that note, I would like to list the following glitches or quality of life improvements I’ve noticed/ think would be awesome additions in the near foreseeable future:

Glitches
-I noticed that sometimes the point of view glitches or suddenly shifts in a different direction at times.  I don’t know if I am doing anything wrong, but I know I am not hitting anything when it occurs.
-During combat, the sword and shield sometimes get stuck on each other, or they disappear altogether, and I have to reequip them. I don’t know if the enemy is knocking them out of my hand, and that is simply a game mechanic, but I wanted to just put that out there.  

Quality of life improvements
-It would be awesome if we could sheath our sword/ put away our shield (over the shoulder mechanics or a scabbard at your side, etc.) without having to bring up the initial inventory and them assigning each item to a specific hand.  
-A quick deposit gesture for items in your inventory would be fantastic.  Sometimes, I have to pick up an item, carefully put it over my pouch and then place it to where it needs to go.  A quick deposit function where it automatically puts potions or scavenging materials to their respectful slot would greatly speed up gameplay. 

All in all, I am incredibly satisfied with this game, and I look forward to future updates/ additions.  This game is a wonderful addition to my VR library, and I can’t wait to explore/ experience the other worlds this game has to offer.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a LOT for that detailed feedback (Feel free to join our discord > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd if you want to engage further!)
- POV glitching: unsure about it so far
- Weapons knocked-out of your hands: there is a mechanic where enemies can disarm you and remove your shield. One of the early "big dude" in the Smugglers Cave tutorialize this, there is a little panel explaining the mechanic right at the entrance of the cave. You can do the same to them: by smashing repeatedly the shield of opponents, you can destroy it (you cannot totally disarm them, though)
- For the Quality of life issue: some we are already investigating.... right now, we are reacting to the issues that impact the game negatively, but hopefully soo we'll be able to start looking at pro-active  updates :)
Thanks again for the nice words, it matters a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: I didn't know what to expect, but I was curious about the raving reviews.  I am quite pleased with this.  The graphics are not the best, but the gameplay makes you forget about the graphics.  I actually love this game.  It is very, so far, a great story... its pretty darn good.

developer_response.body: Glad that you enjoy our game! Thanks for the nice review: the story has a few twists that we hope you'll enjoy!

reviews.review_description: Excited to play this game. Wasn't expecting much from pixel graphics but they were okay. Character development was meh. Played first 30 minutes climbing and zip line mechanics were fun. Expects you to use a combination of free motion AND teleport to get items. I get to the second area where the tutorials to craft things and it's broken. It's asking me to use two plants and an empty vial and stir, but the empty vial won't fit into the input section. Seriously frustrating as it's only the tutorial. Definitely not ready for release. Refunded

developer_response.body:
Glad you enjoyed the climbing mechanics!

The empty vial in the tutorial is placed into the bowl itself, as indicated by the Text Panel next to the bowl.
This playthrough video should help _ :) _ at 9-minutes: https://youtu.be/WVSl6F20wkc?si=0dXeXAAoGTuf-RZU&t=541

reviews.review_description: I’m having some fun with the game but it has a lot of bugs. Inventory system it’s just plan bad. Why not have a backpack system why not just reach over to get your sword, why not give us the ability to holster our guns. These mechanics have been used in other games for years . I just think they wanted to do something new but it just doesn’t work. Picking up items to store them is a nightmare. Please update this game with a new inventory system.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Recent updates now allow you to grab weapons from over the shoulder (option in the settings),  pick up items from a distance, and more :)  Check it out!

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs some more work
reviews.review_description:
After uninstalling and reinstalling my issue was fixed but the real heroes are the devs who actually talk to their community and this game is being actively worked on. 
This is a solid game just needs some extra polish and some QOL improvements. Also if your on the fence give it a shot itll be worth your wild.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the updated review! It is great to have you on our discord, and we look forward to putting out more updates for the community! 
https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description: In general the game is fun, but had a few issues with it,  like my hands got really long ,like Freddy Kruger hands. And When I was on skull island I went into the tavern, and I was in the ceiling or something, because it was all black couldn't see anything except for a few shadows and could hear people talking, had to reset game, and then it was fine, Well climbing ladders my weapons come out on occasion and the one time I got up Onto a ledge from a ladder and my hand was all stuck weird. And the sword was stuck up in the air. And I couldn't use it to kill a bad guy. When I jump down from the ledge, my hands went back to normal. I've also found cow's Stuck in the ground looking straight up at the sky. And guys on horses stuck in a rock. I  hit the cow and it fixed it, but didn't work For the man on the horse. I've been so excited for this game, l love your other games,  but I'm just a little Underwhelmed , I wish when you Blocked with the sword, the bad guy.  couldn't swing through your block. And I wish you'd of just added a jump button not a Teleport, but I do injoy exploring 👍👋 gave you five-star just because I think all the problems will be fixed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the detailed review! We are about to announce a corrective patch, as well as open up our discord, for those of you interested engaging with us! :)
EDIT: Discord open (link in the store post) - come join us! :)

reviews.review_title: Nice but fiddly - promising start though
reviews.review_description:
I've put a fair few hours into this game so thought I'd update my review.
The good: 
Combat is really fun - lots of different choices. Ranged, sword, gun/dagger and magic.
Movement is fluid and fast
Open world is great and has plenty of cool things to find 
You can even have companions. I've got a dog. He's nice.
The bad:
Combat is janky. If your sword and shield meet, and it does happen often then your wrist goes all limp and you end up waving your sword about helplessly whilst back-pedalling
Ranged is good but has limitations. I climbed a guard tower, saw 4 guys and a wolf in a bandit camp and settled in with my bow. Couldn't damage them. The arrows were hitting them. I could see they were, but I just wasted arrows and they took no damage. 
When engaging, if you pull enemies but go too far then the whole lot just respawn even if you've taken out a few.
Spell casting just seems too inaccurate and slow to be of any use at all.

The NPCs look hideous 😂

Still, this game is just fun. It really is, even with all these issues. I can't stop playing it.
It's worth 15 pounds because it's just so much fun to play.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, glad you are enjoying the game! :)

reviews.review_title: Not for everyone, but I love it!
reviews.review_description:
NOTE: This score was 4 stars prior to the last two updates.

First things first. Visually, this game will not be for everyone. That's okay. Every video game isn't meant for you. Personally, I love the aesthetic. As an older gamer, it feels like I'm a first person Super Nintendo game. 

We rarely get a VR game with this amount of content. Lots of different side quests, weapons, areas to explore, NPCs. And the graphics & music make it all so charming. 

The combat is... just okay. It's more about the power fantasy once you get a good mix of weapons and spells than any real threat or difficulty. 

Basically, the game is more than the sum of its parts. Nothing really stands out, it just all works together.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review LiveOpenMike! We're glad you are enjoying it :)
And we have more updates on the way, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Beautiful well created art style game
reviews.review_description:
Excellent well crafted adventure experience with a unique but beautiful art style. It is also designed with its unique inventory system. It is somewhat different from the usual high texture and graphical output games but it works well and it is well crafted and throughout. A few bug fixes by the hard working developers would make this AAA. 
Combat system is excellent. I definitely recommend if you like adventure with a variety of weapons and unique VR interactions

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are working at squashing some of the quirks that players encountered!

reviews.review_title: Not a good launch but fixed soon after
reviews.review_description:
I was really looking forward to this game but have been disappointed.  As many have stated the inventory system is buggy.  It has made this game unplayable for me as my sword disappears when crafting a potion no matter which hand I use to grab the spoon to stir. 
The Devs applied an update that fixed the inventory issue. Thank you very much.  I was able to play further and am enjoying the game so far.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Glad to know you are able to experience the game in a better light :)

reviews.review_title: Super fun but have to docket a star
reviews.review_description: Can't crouch down to grab stuff. Sometimes, it's a bit hard to get what you're trying to get on the floor, for example, like knives crossbow arrows for your bow or even the dog's bone the belt sometimes gets in the way but if you hide it it's all right kind of other then that i dont know if im moving to fast but the frame rate tends to drop a bit so far it doesn't crash the game but i can see that being a problem but these are minor bugs and fixes but the game is super fun and I'm loving every bit of it highly recommend for anyone that loves shooting sword fighting and plus being like a wizard all in one awesome stuff and the story so far is interesting!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice words! We've made some edits to the belt that should fix the major issues. We noticed some slight frame drop on the very large islands (like Drakken Isle) - we are investigating ways to mitigate it! Feel free to join us on Discord to chat about the game! :) > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_title: Game needs things. But good game
reviews.review_description:
The belt needs work. Doesn't move with your body 
Game could use a jump action. Right anolog push 
I hate teleporting in VR  
Smooth movement is slow on fast option
Grabbing things is really touchy 
Maps feel empty. Needs more enemies on maps 
Love the combat and spell work 
Reloading the gun needs to be different 
Putting gun down to side should reload the gun 
And not have to put gun away to reload 
When picking up ammo. It goes directly into inventory.  So picking up other items should go directly into inventory. And not having to drop them into slots. 
Easy stuff to fix with updates I'm sure 
👍

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good words! We've announced a patch to fix some of the things you mentioned (belt, some of the movement speed is slightly increased) and will keep working on smoothing the experience.

reviews.review_title: The fresh approach on retro RPG in VR
reviews.review_description: The fresh approach on retro RPG in VR! The game tempts to be explored like the old RPG games from the past. There is some magic and uncertainty around it convincing me to move forward.

developer_response.body:
Thanks! It's definitely an "exploration" game for us as well!
Thank you for your nice review!!!

reviews.review_description: Great game!!  Great Devs!!  Thanks guys, loving your work.     🫠🤙 I’m having so much fun DrakkenRidge!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review!!! :) goes straight to our heart! Don't hesitate to connect with us on Discord > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description: I'm liking the game. But I have a few issues. I play all games sat down. But if I play on the seated mode I'm too high in game to reach anything below me. Especially my storage area But if I play on the standing mode then I'm too low to reach anything above me. There is no middle ground. Also my hands go really thin and long like sticks you could say at times and can't grab anything. My friend also has had same issue with their hands.  Other than that it's a good game.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Recent updates have fixed your hand issues! And added some highly-requested features such as grabbing weapons from behind shoulder (option in the settings), pick up items at a distance, jumping, and more! (v8.0+)
Thanks for the review!
There is a height adjustment slider in the menu as well, allowing you to fine-tune your height - as well as a height slider for the belt (at the bottom of the settings menu). Glad you are liking the game!

reviews.review_title: This game has Elders Scrolls vibes
reviews.review_description: Everything is fixed as far as I have seen.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good review! Oblivion, and a few others were indeed an inspiration... A reviewer called DrakkenRidge the "Younger Scrolls"... we like that :)

reviews.review_description: playing so far is a lot of fun, i love how the game reminds me of Everquest! so far everything works great!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review! Glad to have you on our Discord!

reviews.review_description: When I go to load my game it spawns me off the ship and I fall into the water over and over again. The game  is pretty much unplayable now.

developer_response.body: We've just issued a corrective patch to fix this situation (v8.7): if you still encounter this issue, please reach out to our Discord> https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd so that we can assess your particular case.

reviews.review_description: As such, holding off for more updates.  Also, the inventory management system needs work.  Makes for some frustrating moments.

developer_response.body: We encourage you to check the new patch, and reach out on our discord if you still encounter problems > https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description: So I’m in the sewer  level and this one mob keeps spawning camping me and I am stuck in a death loop

developer_response.body:
EDIT: I was pushing an update today, so I looked into the issue for you! And I removed the floating slime next to the spawn point. Check that you are on build v7.5+ (build # on bottom right of game menu).  Let us know if this solved it for you, and feel free to reach out on our discord. Cheers!
ORIGINAL: Hey there! We're glad to help you out here. Reach out to us on our discord and we'll help get it solved! https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description: I love this developer's previous game and this improves on it in every way. Now that they have fixed the speed turn on smooth option, it runs much much better. Great job guys!￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words! We're glad to hear you are enjoying it.
And we have additional updates on the way - so there's even more to look forward to :)

reviews.review_description: Game looks and plays great!

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear you are enjoying the experience! And we're excited for you to discover all the varied environments on each island :)
Feel free to reach out with any questions or comments on our discord: https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd

reviews.review_description:
Wow. What a killer rpg!!! I've been waiting for this exact type of game since putting on a headset. The vastness of this game is staggering to behold. Well executed combat with a really fun magic system. Most of the core elements are VR AF. Well done developers. I can't wait to jump back in and do just one more quest. 

My only gripe is just a personal preference and more of a joke really... but come on guys!!! Put a chest or some loot out in the middle of nowhere!!! 

But great job. Definitely would recommend for anyone looking to play an oblivion/Skyrim type of game in VR.

developer_response.body:
YAY! Thanks for the good words! Wait, we have chests in many places, some that could be called "middle of nowhere"...is that an exploration challenge? ;)
Thanks for the great review, and glad to know you enjoyed our game!!!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this fantasy game. I only have a few things that can be improved. When u get keys, sometimes you can’t grab it from your belt. I did eventually grabbed it once I froze the belt in place. The problem I ran into now is in the sewer level and climbing the ladders is broken. Whenever you touch the ladder you get glitched through the level, and that’s bad news when facing the boss. Hopefully you can look through these problems and fix them. Other than that, love the game.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We have fixed your issues and added some highly-requested new features (v8.0) including: ladder climbing improvements, key grab fix, ability to pick up items at a distance, option to grab weapons from over your shoulder, ability to jump, and more! Check it out :)
Thanks for the good words! (and if you'd like to join our Discord >  https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd )

reviews.review_title: Seems like a great game but issues
reviews.review_description:
Issues with belt, items grabbing and weapons are already mentioned in other reviews, so I'll go with some suggestions instead to the 2 dev team :) 

Could you reproduce what has proved to be done well in some other games? 
2 weapons on both sides, shield behind the shoulder, and lower back for backpack  maybe.b that would probably solve some issues users have.

Settings for weapons handling angle would be awesome.

I will wait for updates before jumping back in again and will rate again then, the few issues break the fun to me.

developer_response.body: UPDATE: Hello! Check out our latest update (v8.0+) for the ability to grab weapons from over the shoulder, pick up items from a distance, and more! Thanks for the review :)

reviews.review_description:
Game  has great potential but it has a couple of bugs.
1. Environment gets fill with water 
2. When climbing a latter it glitches and teleports me 
3. I don’t know if normal but some chest seem to be already opened 
If all the bugs get fix definitely will be a 5 star game.

developer_response.body:
Hey there - bugs have been fixed!
We've published some updates, including addressing what you mention here.
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Exactly what quest has been needing

developer_response.body:
For sure, we agree with you! And we are happy to provide this adventure for the community.
Thanks for the good review! Stay tuned for more gameplay updates, and if you want to join our discord you're more than welcome: https://discord.com/invite/JQgYrW8VRd
